Messages:
  - The project is a mobile-first web application called **StressCare**, designed for stress monitoring, migraine risk assessment, and wellness interventions. It uses a clean, modern tech stack focused on frontend performance and simple backend serving.

### 1. Tech Stack
*   **Frontend**: Pure HTML5, CSS3, and Vanilla JavaScript.
*   **Icons**: Font Awesome 6.5.0 (CDN-loaded).
*   **Styling**: Highly modular CSS with separate files for each feature/page, using a "phone-frame" container to simulate a mobile app experience.
*   **Backend**: Node.js `http` server (`server.js`) serving static files with basic routing and 302 redirects for cleaner URL paths.
*   **Data Handling**: `js/main.js` includes a `StorageHelper` for `localStorage` and an `API` helper ready for future REST integration.

### 2. Project Structure
The repository is organized into feature-specific directories:
*   `/html`: Contains all 25+ application screens as individual HTML files.
*   `/css`: Contains modular stylesheets corresponding to the HTML pages (e.g., `dashboard.css`, `auth.css`).
*   `/js`: Contains `main.js` for global functions like navigation, formatting, and UI interactions (FAQ toggles, star ratings).
*   `/images` & `/assets`: Media assets including logos and onboarding illustrations.
*   `/attached_assets`: A collection of reference screenshots/images used during development.
*   `server.js`: Entry point for the Node.js environment.

### 3. Existing Pages & Components

#### Core Pages (Found in `/html`):
*   **Onboarding/Auth**: `splash.html`, `onboarding-1/2/3.html`, `login.html`, `register.html`, `forgot-password.html`, `reset-password.html`.
*   **Main Dashboard**: `home.html` (Status bar, wearable connectivity, stress gauge, health metrics).
*   **Monitoring & Health**: `monitoring.html`, `sleep-analysis.html`, `migraine-risk.html`, `calibration.html`.
*   **Analytics**: `history.html`, `insights.html`, `report.html`, `report-detail.html`.
*   **User Features**: `profile.html`, `settings.html`, `notifications.html`, `subscription.html`.
*   **Support & Feedback**: `help.html`, `feedback.html`, `cloud-sync.html`.
*   **Interventions**: `interventions.html` (Breathing exercises and stress relief tools).

#### Key UI Components:
*   **Phone Frame**: A wrapper used across all pages to maintain a mobile aspect ratio.
*   **Navigation**:
    *   `dp-bottom-nav`: Persistent footer with Home, Monitoring, History, Interventions, and Profile.
    *   `dp-topnav`: Header with logo and notification bell.
*   **Cards**: Standardized `wearable-card`, `metric-card`, and `qa-card` (Quick Actions).
*   **Interactive Elements**: Circular SVG stress gauges, line-chart wave animations for metrics, and star-rating systems.

<script>
    function switchTab(btn, tabId) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.rd-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('rd-tab-active'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.rd-tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.add('rd-hidden'));
      btn.classList.add('rd-tab-active');
      document.getElementById('tab-' + tabId).classList.remove('rd-hidden');
    }

    function exportReport() {
      document.getElementById('exportModal').style.display = 'flex';
    }

    function closeExport() {
      document.getElementById('exportModal').style.display = 'none';
    }

    function doPrint() {
      closeExport();
      setTimeout(() => window.print(), 200);
    }

    function shareReport() {
      closeExport();
      if (navigator.share) {
        navigator.share({
          title: 'StressCare Report — May 22, 2025',
          text: 'My stress report: 58% Moderate stress, Heart Rate 78 bpm, Migraine Risk Low (12%)',
          url: window.location.href
        }).catch(() => {});
      } else {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href).then(() => {
          showToast('Link copied to clipboard!');
        }).catch(() => {
          showToast('Share not supported on this device.');
        });
      }
    }

    function showToast(msg) {
      const t = document.createElement('div');
      t.className = 'rd-toast';
      t.textContent = msg;
      document.body.appendChild(t);
      setTimeout(() => t.classList.add('rd-toast-show'), 10);
      setTimeout(() => { t.classList.remove('rd-toast-show'); setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 300); }, 2500);
    }

    document.getElementById('exportModal').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      if (e.target === this) closeExport();
    });
  </script>

      calMonth += dir;
      if (calMonth < 0)  { calMonth = 11; calYear--; }
      if (calMonth > 11) { calMonth = 0;  calYear++; }
      renderCalendar();
    }

    function renderCalendar() {
      document.getElementById('calMonthLabel').textContent = MONTHS[calMonth] + ' ' + calYear;

      const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');
      grid.innerHTML = '';

      const firstDay = new Date(calYear, calMonth, 1).getDay();
      const daysInMonth = new Date(calYear, calMonth + 1, 0).getDate();
      const today = new Date();

      // blank cells before first day
      for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const blank = document.createElement('div');
        blank.className = 'hist-cal-cell hist-cal-blank';
        grid.appendChild(blank);
      }

      for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
        const cell = document.createElement('button');
        cell.className = 'hist-cal-cell';
        cell.textContent = d;

        const iso = calYear + '-' +
          String(calMonth + 1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' +
          String(d).padStart(2,'0');

        const isToday = (today.getFullYear() === calYear &&
                         today.getMonth() === calMonth &&
                         today.getDate() === d);
        const hasSession = SESSION_DATES.includes(iso);
        const isSelected = (selectedDate === iso);
        const isFuture = new Date(iso) > today;

        if (isToday) cell.classList.add('hist-cal-today');
        if (hasSession) cell.classList.add('hist-cal-has-session');
        if (isSelected) cell.classList.add('hist-cal-selected');
        if (isFuture) { cell.classList.add('hist-cal-future'); cell.disabled = true; }

        cell.addEventListener('click', () => selectDate(iso, cell));
        grid.appendChild(cell);
      }

      document.getElementById('calApplyBtn').disabled = !selectedDate;
    }

    function selectDate(iso, cell) {
      selectedDate = iso;
      document.querySelectorAll('.hist-cal-cell').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('hist-cal-selected'));
      cell.classList.add('hist-cal-selected');
      document.getElementById('calApplyBtn').disabled = false;
    }

    function applyFilter() {
      if (!selectedDate) return;
      closeCalendar();

      const [y, m, d] = selectedDate.split('-');
      const label = MONTHS[parseInt(m)-1] + ' ' + parseInt(d) + ', ' + y;

      document.getElementById('filterChipLabel').textContent = label;
      document.getElementById('filterChip').style.display = 'flex';
      document.getElementById('filterLabel').textContent = label;

      filterSessions(selectedDate);
    }

    function filterSessions(dateStr) {
      const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.hist-session-row');
      let found = 0;
      rows.forEach(row => {
        const match = row.dataset.date === dateStr;
        row.style.display = match ? 'flex' : 'none';
        if (match) found++;
      });
      document.getElementById('noSessionMsg').style.display = found === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
    }

    function clearFilter() {
      selectedDate = null;
      document.getElementById('filterChip').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('filterLabel').textContent = 'Filter';
      document.querySelectorAll('.hist-session-row').forEach(r => r.style.display = 'flex');
      document.getElementById('noSessionMsg').style.display = 'none';
    }
  </script>
